testcase.name: test_login_success

failure.message: assert None is not None + where None = <test_iteration_149_enjoy_page.TestEnjoyRSVPFlow object at 0xfece7e444090>.token

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_149_enjoy_page.py:150: in test_login_success assert self.token is not None E assert None is not None E + where None = <test_iteration_149_enjoy_page.TestEnjoyRSVPFlow object at 0xfece7e444090>.token

testcase.name: test_get_user_pets
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_149_enjoy_page.py:157: in test_get_user_pets assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_rsvp_for_experience
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_149_enjoy_page.py:193: in test_create_rsvp_for_experience assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"RSVP failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: RSVP failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","pet_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"experience_id":"exp-dogpark-mumbai","experience_name":"Weekend Dog Park Meetup","user_email":"dipali@clubconcierge.in","user_name":"Dipali","pet_ids":[],"pet_names":"Test Pet","number_of_pets":1,"number_of_humans":1,"special_requirements":"Test RSVP from iteration 149"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_rsvp_creates_service_desk_ticket
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_149_enjoy_page.py:220: in test_rsvp_creates_service_desk_ticket assert response.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
